title: Leetcode 2407. Longest Increasing Subsequence II
shortDescription: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence of nums such that each adjacent difference is ≤ k. With n up to 1e5 and values bounded, this reduces to DP where dp[x] = 1 + max dp[y] for y in [x-k, x-1], requiring a range-maximum data structure (segment tree / Fenwick) for efficiency.

Leetcode 2407. Longest Increasing Subsequence II

Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence of nums such that each adjacent difference is ≤ k. With n up to 1e5 and values bounded, this reduces to DP where dp[x] = 1 + max dp[y] for y in [x-k, x-1], requiring a range-maximum data structure (segment tree / Fenwick) for efficiency.
